conversion.subtitle: THE PIPELINE
conversion.title: Ready to stop guessing and start building?
conversion.description: Let's align on your architecture, timeline, and budget. No hard sales pitch, just a technical deep dive.

steps.title: 1. The 30-Minute Scoping Call
steps.desc: We map out your core features, technical constraints, and business goals.

steps.title: 2. The 48-Hour Blueprint
steps.desc: You receive a comprehensive technical architecture plan, timeline, and to-the-dollar fixed price.

steps.title: 3. Execution & Delivery
steps.desc: We build. You monitor progress in real-time via Slack and staging links.

items.q: How long does a project take to build?
items.a: Our senior engineers work in rapid sprints, and most projects ship in 4 to 8 weeks depending on complexity — simpler builds like a business website can be live even faster.

items.q: What does a project actually cost?
items.a: It depends on your business size. A business website for a local shop starts at ₹15,000. A custom MVP or internal tool typically runs ₹1.5L-₹3L. Growth-stage systems — CRMs, automation, multi-platform builds — run ₹3L-₹5L. For enterprise-scale or highly custom requirements, we quote after a scoping call. See the full pricing breakdown for exact tiers.

items.q: What if I need changes after the project is delivered?
items.a: We offer an annual maintenance contract (20% of the initial project cost) covering platform updates, security patches, and minor bug fixes. For larger feature additions, we scope and quote them as separate change requests — you're never locked out of your own product.

items.q: How do I know I'll actually own my app or software?
items.a: We believe in complete transparency. We've published a due-diligence checklist covering code ownership, app store accounts, and hosting. We assign full source code and IP to you upon final payment, and give you direct access to all infrastructure.
